isolation.notes: Dedicated session used only for assigned recipe-management assertion group.

assertionResults.reason: Blocked by authentication prerequisite: /recipes is protected and redirects to /sign-in in a fresh dedicated session, and Clerk sign-up remained stuck in Loading in headless automation while console logged Private Access Token/Cloudflare challenge behavior with 401, so an authenticated recipes session could not be established for recipe-list/detail management validation.

frictions.description: Headless Clerk auth flow did not complete account creation in-session; submit stayed in Loading state and prevented reaching authenticated /recipes UI.
frictions.resolution: Retried in the same dedicated session, waited for completion window, and captured redirect/auth diagnostics for blocker evidence.

blockers.description: Could not establish authenticated session required for VAL-REC-001..014.
blockers.details: Observed /recipes -> /sign-in redirect; sign-up submit remained loading; console reported Private Access Token challenge warning and 401 response; no authenticated recipes page access achieved.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Retried sign-up flow, waited >12s after submit, captured console/errors/network/header evidence, and confirmed blocker persisted.

summary: Tested VAL-REC-001..014: 0 passed, 0 failed, 14 blocked by external auth challenge preventing authenticated recipe management flow access.
